title: [Flink 0.10.1 released](</2015/11/27/flink-0.10.1-released/>)
summary:
#  Flink 0.10.1 released
November 27, 2015 -
Today, the Flink community released the first bugfix release of the 0.10 series of Flink.
We recommend all users updating to this release, by bumping the version of your Flink dependencies and up…
